output_debit_classifier.reason: This is a straightforward service revenue transaction. Atlas Van Lines provided moving services valued at $25,500 and received immediate payment in the form of a certified cheque. A certified cheque is a cash equivalent—it is guaranteed by the bank and can be deposited immediately, so it is treated as cash received. The services have been performed (delivered to the customer), satisfying the revenue recognition criteria under IFRS 15. No tax is mentioned in the transaction text, so no tax lines are added. The entry records the increase in cash (asset) and the recognition of service revenue.
